obsidian.$description: Obsidian — Primary text, nav labels on light photography, footer and legal copy, card inversions, and full-bleed section dividers — the absolute dark that frames everything

pure-white.$description: Pure White — Page canvas, card surfaces, and inverse nav labels on dark photography — the negative space that lets imagery breathe

saint-laurent-wordmark-custom.$description: The YSL logotype is a proprietary custom mark — elongated wedges, condensed proportions, and a vertical stress that no system font replicates. Used only as the centered site identifier in the header. Do not substitute; this mark IS the brand. If a stand-in is needed, use Bodoni 175 condensed or Didot thin, tracked tightly.

helvetica-neue-inter-system-sans.$description: Editorial captions and collection labels floating near image edges (e.g. 'WOMEN'S SUMMER 25 / DESCUBRE LA SELECCIÓN DE BOLSO'). Centered, uppercase, wide letter-spacing — a film-credit feel rather than a product label.

canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Page background, the field photography floats on or replaces

inversion.$description: Surface level 1: Full-bleed dark sections and card surfaces that invert the canvas — no shadow needed, the value flip is the elevation
